***Sepsis violacea*** is a [European](/wiki/Europe "Europe") species of [flies](/wiki/Fly "Fly") and member of the family [Sepsidae](/wiki/Sepsidae "Sepsidae").[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-Pont1979-4)[[5]](#cite_note-Pont2002-5)
